description_en: Unique accounting document number within company code and fiscal year.
description_hr: Jedinstveni broj računovodstvenog dokumenta unutar šifre društva i poslovne godine.
business_meaning: Primary key component for accounting documents in BKPF table. Together with BUKRS and GJAHR forms unique identifier. Sequential numbering typically managed by number ranges per document type.

description_en: Document header text describing the business transaction or purpose.
description_hr: Tekst zaglavlja dokumenta koji opisuje poslovnu transakciju ili svrhu.
business_meaning: Human-readable description of the document purpose or transaction details. Often populated automatically from document type or manually entered for clarity. Used in reports and document displays for business users.

description_en: Document type that categorizes the accounting document by business transaction.
description_hr: Vrsta dokumenta koja kategorizira računovodstveni dokument prema poslovnoj transakciji.
business_meaning: Controls document behavior, number ranges, and account types allowed. Common values: RE=Invoice, KR=Vendor Invoice, DR=Customer Invoice, SA=G/L Document. Critical for procurement-to-pay process tracking.

description_en: Document date from the original business transaction or external document.
description_hr: Datum dokumenta iz originalne poslovne transakcije ili vanjskog dokumenta.
business_meaning: Business transaction date, often from external documents like vendor invoices. Used for due date calculations and audit trails. Can differ from posting date for control purposes. Format YYYYMMDD.

description_en: Posting date when the document was posted to the general ledger.
description_hr: Datum proknjižbe kad je dokument proknjižen u glavnu knjigu.
business_meaning: Determines fiscal period for financial reporting and affects period balances. Can differ from document date for timing control. Format YYYYMMDD. Primary date for financial period analysis.

description_en: Company code that identifies a legal entity within the SAP system.
description_hr: Šifra društva koja identificira pravnu osobu unutar SAP sustava.
business_meaning: Organizational dimension that groups all accounting documents by legal entity. In HT context, typically represents different subsidiaries or business units within the Helios Telecom Group structure.

description_en: Fiscal year in which the accounting document was posted.
description_hr: Poslovna godina u kojoj je računovodstveni dokument proknjižen.
business_meaning: Temporal dimension for financial reporting and document organization. Part of primary key ensuring document numbers are unique per fiscal year. Critical for period-based financial analysis.

description_en: SAP user name who created the accounting document.
description_hr: SAP korisničko ime koje je stvorilo računovodstveni dokument.
business_meaning: Audit trail field showing who posted the document. Used for approval workflow tracking and segregation of duties analysis. Links to user master data for organizational reporting.

description_en: Reference document number from external system or manual entry.
description_hr: Referentni broj dokumenta iz vanjskog sustava ili ručnog unosa.
business_meaning: Links SAP documents to external references like vendor invoice numbers, bank statements, or legacy system IDs. Critical for three-way matching in procurement processes and audit reconciliation.

description_en: Accounting document number uniquely identifying the financial document.
description_hr: Broj računovodstvenog dokumenta koji jedinstveno identificira financijski dokument.
business_meaning: Primary key component in accounting line items. Links to document header (BKPF) and enables traceability of all financial postings related to procurement transactions including invoice receipts and payments.

description_en: Posting key defining the type of accounting entry and account assignment.
description_hr: Ključ knjiženja koji definira vrstu računovodstvene stavke i dodjelu računa.
business_meaning: Controls which account types can be posted (01=Customer, 31=Vendor, 40=G/L account, etc.) and determines debit/credit logic. Essential for automated three-way matching and vendor payment processing in procurement.

description_en: Company code identifying the legal entity or organizational unit.
description_hr: Šifra društva koja identificira pravnu osobu ili organizacijsku jedinicu.
business_meaning: Standard SAP organizational dimension that groups all accounting documents by company. Essential for multi-company reporting and legal consolidation in procurement-to-pay processes.

description_en: Line item number within the accounting document.
description_hr: Broj stavke linije unutar računovodstvenog dokumenta.
business_meaning: Sequential numbering of line items within each document. Completes the primary key (BUKRS+BELNR+GJAHR+BUZEI) and enables detailed analysis of individual posting entries in procurement workflows.

description_en: Amount in local currency of the company code.
description_hr: Iznos u lokalnoj valuti šifre društva.
business_meaning: Standardized currency amount for consolidation and reporting. Always reflects the company's local currency regardless of transaction currency, enabling consistent financial analysis across HT's procurement operations.

description_en: Fiscal year for the accounting document posting.
description_hr: Poslovna godina za knjiženje računovodstvenog dokumenta.
business_meaning: Part of the primary key that enables year-based partitioning and reporting. Critical for period-end closing processes and multi-year procurement analytics in CPE lifecycle management.

description_en: General ledger account number for the posting.
description_hr: Broj glavne knjige računa za knjiženje.
business_meaning: Links financial postings to chart of accounts structure. Critical for procurement expense classification, asset capitalization tracking, and financial reporting of CPE investments and operational costs.

description_en: Material number identifying the procured item or equipment.
description_hr: Broj materijala koji identificira nabavljenu stavku ili opremu.
business_meaning: Links accounting entries to specific CPE items in material master. Enables equipment-level cost tracking, asset lifecycle analysis, and procurement spend categorization for network infrastructure components.

description_en: Debit/credit indicator for the accounting entry.
description_hr: Indikator duguje/potražuje za računovodstvenu stavku.
business_meaning: Determines posting direction: S=Debit, H=Credit. Essential for double-entry bookkeeping validation and automated reconciliation processes in procurement-to-pay workflows and vendor account management.

description_en: Currency key for the transaction amount.
description_hr: Ključ valute za iznos transakcije.
business_meaning: ISO currency code (EUR, USD, HRK, etc.) that corresponds to WRBTR amount. Critical for multi-currency vendor management and international CPE procurement where currency risks and conversion rates must be tracked.

description_en: Plant code representing the physical location or organizational unit.
description_hr: Šifra pogona koja predstavlja fizičku lokaciju ili organizacijsku jedinicu.
business_meaning: Organizational dimension linking financial postings to specific HT facilities, regions, or network sites. Essential for location-based procurement analytics and regional CPE deployment cost tracking.

description_en: Amount in transaction currency as originally posted.
description_hr: Iznos u valuti transakcije kako je originalno knjižen.
business_meaning: Original transaction amount before currency conversion. Critical for multi-currency procurement scenarios and vendor payment processing where exchange rate fluctuations must be tracked and managed.

description_en: Requisition date when the purchase requisition was created.
description_hr: Datum zahtjeva kada je kreiran zahtjev za nabavu.
business_meaning: Document creation date in YYYYMMDD format. Key temporal dimension for procurement reporting and lead time analysis. Differs from delivery date (EINDT) which represents when material is needed.

description_en: Purchase requisition number uniquely identifying the requisition document.
description_hr: Broj zahtjeva za nabavu koji jedinstveno identificira dokument zahtjeva.
business_meaning: Primary identifier for purchase requisitions in SAP MM. Links to purchase orders (EBELN) and serves as the main reference for requisition-to-order tracking. Format typically 10-digit numeric string.

description_en: Purchase requisition item number within the requisition document.
description_hr: Broj stavke zahtjeva za nabavu unutar dokumenta zahtjeva.
business_meaning: Line item number within a purchase requisition, typically incrementing by 10 (00010, 00020, etc.). Combined with BANFN forms the complete primary key for requisition items.

description_en: Purchasing group responsible for processing this requisition.
description_hr: Nabavna grupa odgovorna za obradu ovog zahtjeva.
business_meaning: Organizational unit responsible for vendor negotiation and purchase order creation. Links to purchasing group master data (T024). In CPE procurement, typically organized by equipment category or regional responsibility.

description_en: Purchasing organization with authority to procure this material.
description_hr: Nabavna organizacija s ovlaštenjem za nabavu ovog materijala.
business_meaning: Highest organizational level for procurement decisions, determining vendor contracts and pricing conditions. Links to organizational master data and vendor master records. Critical for CPE vendor management and contract assignment.

description_en: User name of the person who created the purchase requisition.
description_hr: Korisničko ime osobe koja je kreirala zahtjev za nabavu.
business_meaning: SAP user ID of the requisition creator, linking to user master data. Used for tracking procurement initiation patterns, user training needs, and approval routing in CPE equipment requests.

description_en: Creation indicator showing how the purchase requisition was created.
description_hr: Indikator kreiranja koji pokazuje kako je kreiran zahtjev za nabavu.
business_meaning: Creation type flag: blank=manual, X=automatic (MRP), B=from sales order, etc. Important for understanding procurement triggers and optimizing automatic vs manual CPE equipment ordering processes.

description_en: Release date when the purchase requisition was approved for processing.
description_hr: Datum otpuštanja kada je zahtjev za nabavu odobren za obradu.
business_meaning: Date when requisition passed all approval workflows and became available for purchase order creation. Critical for procurement cycle time measurement and identifying approval bottlenecks in CPE equipment procurement.

description_en: Storage location where the requisitioned material will be received.
description_hr: Mjesto skladištenja gdje će se primiti zatraženi materijal.
business_meaning: Storage location within the plant for inventory placement after goods receipt. Critical for CPE equipment tracking and field technician inventory management. Must exist in combination with plant (WERKS).

description_en: Material number identifying the requested material or service.
description_hr: Broj materijala koji identificira traženi materijal ili uslugu.
business_meaning: Standard SAP material master key linking to material master data (MARA, MARC). For CPE equipment, identifies specific device models, accessories, or services. Zero-padded 18-character format.

description_en: Base unit of measure for the requested material quantity.
description_hr: Osnovna mjerna jedinica za količinu zatraženog materijala.
business_meaning: Unit of measure from SAP unit master (T006). Common values for CPE: PC (pieces), M (meters), KG (kilograms), H (hours). Must be consistent with material master unit settings.

description_en: Quantity of material requested in base unit of measure.
description_hr: Količina zatraženog materijala u osnovnoj mjeri.
business_meaning: Requested quantity in the material's base unit (MEINS). For CPE equipment, typically represents number of devices, cables, or service hours. Used for purchase order creation and budget planning.

description_en: Estimated or target price per unit for the requested material.
description_hr: Procijenjena ili ciljna cijena po jedinici za zatraženi materijal.
business_meaning: Price per unit in document currency, used for budget estimation and purchase order limits. May come from material master, info records, or manual entry. Critical for procurement approval workflows.

description_en: Processing status of the purchase requisition item.
description_hr: Status obrade stavke zahtjeva za nabavu.
business_meaning: Current processing state: blank=open, B=PO created, A=assigned to contract, etc. Critical for tracking requisition-to-order conversion and identifying stuck CPE equipment requests in procurement workflows.

description_en: Plant code identifying the requesting organizational unit.
description_hr: Šifra pogona koji identificira organizacijsku jedinicu koja postavlja zahtjev.
business_meaning: Manufacturing or service plant where the material is needed. In CPE procurement, typically represents regional service centers or warehouses. Links to organizational master data and determines procurement rules.

description_en: Purchase requisition number serving as unique identifier for procurement requests.
description_hr: Broj zahtjeva za nabavku koji služi kao jedinstveni identifikator za zahtjeve za nabavku.
business_meaning: Primary key for purchase requisitions in SAP MM. Links to EBAN table for requisition header data. Used to track procurement requests from initial need identification through purchase order creation.

description_en: Purchase requisition item number identifying specific line items within a requisition.
description_hr: Broj stavke zahtjeva za nabavku koji identificira specifične stavke unutar zahtjeva.
business_meaning: Part of composite primary key with BANFN. Represents individual line items on purchase requisitions, typically numbered 00010, 00020, 00030. Links to EBAN table for requisition item details.

description_en: Cost center code identifying organizational unit responsible for costs.
description_hr: Šifra mjesta troška koja identificira organizacijsku jedinicu odgovornu za troškove.
business_meaning: Cost center that will bear the expense when requisition is fulfilled. Key dimension for management accounting and budgeting. Links to CSKS table for cost center master data. Enables procurement cost analysis by organizational responsibility.

description_en: General ledger account number for financial posting and cost allocation.
description_hr: Broj računa glavne knjige za financijsko knjiženje i alokaciju troškova.
business_meaning: GL account that will be charged when the requisition is fulfilled. Critical for financial control and reporting. Links to chart of accounts (SKA1/SKB1 tables). Enables cost tracking across procurement activities.

description_en: Reference document number linking to source transaction document.
description_hr: Broj referentnog dokumenta koji povezuje izvorni transakcijski dokument.
business_meaning: Document number of the originating transaction (goods receipt, invoice, service entry sheet). Forms part of the key linking purchase history to actual operational documents. Enables audit trail from PO to final settlement.

description_en: Posting date when the transaction was recorded in the system.
description_hr: Datum knjiženja kada je transakcija zabilježena u sustavu.
business_meaning: Business date when the procurement transaction occurred and was posted to the system. Used for period-based reporting, aging analysis, and determining fiscal periods. Critical for procurement performance metrics and compliance tracking.

description_en: Reference document line item number within the source document.
description_hr: Broj stavke referentnog dokumenta u okviru izvornog dokumenta.
business_meaning: Line item number within the reference document (BELNR) that corresponds to this purchase history entry. Together with BELNR provides precise linkage to specific line items in goods receipts, invoices, or service entries.

description_en: Movement type code classifying the type of goods or inventory movement.
description_hr: Kod tipa kretanja koji klasificira tip kretanja robe ili zaliha.
business_meaning: Three-digit code that categorizes inventory and procurement movements. Common values: 101=GR for PO, 102=GR Reversal, 161=Returns to Vendor, 543=Transfer Posting. Critical for procurement analytics to distinguish between receipts, returns, and transfers.

description_en: Amount in local currency for the procurement transaction value.
description_hr: Iznos u lokalnoj valuti za vrijednost nabavne transakcije.
business_meaning: Monetary value of the procurement transaction converted to local currency. Used for financial reporting, budget tracking, and spend analysis. Always stored alongside currency key (WAERS) to maintain currency context for proper aggregation.

description_en: Purchase document number identifying the purchase order.
description_hr: Broj nabavnog dokumenta koji identificira nabavnu narudžbu.
business_meaning: Unique identifier for purchase orders, purchase requisitions, and other procurement documents. Used as primary key to link procurement transactions across different SAP tables. Format is typically 10-digit alphanumeric.

description_en: Purchase document item number within the purchase order.
description_hr: Broj stavke nabavnog dokumenta u okviru nabavne narudžbe.
business_meaning: Line item number that uniquely identifies individual items within a purchase document. Combined with EBELN forms the complete key for purchase order line items. Typically increments by 10 (00010, 00020, 00030).

description_en: Fiscal year of the transaction or document posting.
description_hr: Fiskalna godina transakcije ili knjiženja dokumenta.
business_meaning: Four-digit fiscal year used for period-based reporting and archiving. May differ from calendar year depending on company's fiscal calendar. Essential for year-over-year procurement analytics and compliance reporting.

description_en: Quantity amount for the procurement transaction in base unit of measure.
description_hr: Količina za nabavnu transakciju u osnovnoj mjerni jedinici.
business_meaning: Quantity delivered, invoiced, or confirmed for the purchase order item. Used to track delivery performance, calculate variances against ordered quantities, and measure procurement volumes. Always expressed in the base unit of measure for the material.

description_en: Transaction/event type code for purchase order history records.
description_hr: Kod tipa transakcije/događaja za povijesne zapise nabavnih narudžbi.
business_meaning: Classifies the type of procurement transaction or event recorded in the history. Common values: 1=Goods Receipt, 2=Invoice Receipt, 3=Service Entry, Q=Confirmation. Used to filter and analyze different procurement activities.

description_en: Currency key identifying the currency for monetary amounts.
description_hr: Ključ valute koji identificira valutu za novčane iznose.
business_meaning: ISO currency code that defines the currency for associated monetary fields like DMBTR. Essential for multi-currency procurement operations and proper financial consolidation. Standard 3-character ISO codes like EUR, USD, HRK.

description_en: Sequential number of account assignment for the purchase order item.
description_hr: Sekvencijski broj dodjele računa za stavku nabavne narudžbe.
business_meaning: Sequential counter for account assignment splits within a purchase order line item. Allows single PO items to be charged to multiple cost centers or accounts. Part of the primary key for purchase history records.

description_en: Purchase document number that uniquely identifies a purchase order.
description_hr: Broj nabavnog dokumenta koji jedinstveno identificira narudžbu.
business_meaning: Primary identifier for purchase orders in SAP MM. Links delivery schedules to their parent purchase order. Format is typically 10-digit numeric padded with leading zeros.

description_en: Purchase document item number identifying a specific line item within a purchase order.
description_hr: Broj stavke nabavnog dokumenta koji identificira specifičnu stavku unutar narudžbe.
business_meaning: Line item number within a purchase order, part of the compound key for purchase order items. Typically increments by 10 (00010, 00020, 00030) to allow for intermediate insertions.

description_en: Delivery date when goods are expected to be delivered according to the schedule line.
description_hr: Datum isporuke kada se očekuje da će roba biti isporučena prema liniji rasporesa.
business_meaning: Planned delivery date for this specific schedule line. Critical for procurement planning and vendor performance tracking. Used in delivery monitoring and expediting processes.

description_en: Delivery schedule line number for planned deliveries within a purchase order item.
description_hr: Broj linije rasporeda isporuke za planisane isporuke unutar stavke narudžbe.
business_meaning: Sequential number identifying individual delivery schedule lines for a purchase order item. Allows splitting deliveries across multiple dates and quantities. Part of the compound primary key for table EKET.

description_en: Scheduled quantity to be delivered on the specified delivery date.
description_hr: Planirana količina za isporuku na navedeni datum isporuke.
business_meaning: Quantity planned for delivery in this schedule line, expressed in the purchase order unit of measure. Sum of all schedule line quantities typically equals the total order quantity for the item.

description_en: Quantity of goods already received against this delivery schedule line.
description_hr: Količina robe već primljene protiv ove linije rasporea isporuke.
business_meaning: Actual received quantity for this schedule line, updated through goods receipt transactions. Difference between MENGE and WEMNG shows outstanding delivery quantity. Used for delivery completion tracking.

description_en: Purchase order number serving as unique identifier for procurement documents.
description_hr: Broj nabavnog naloga koji služi kao jedinstveni identifikator nabavnih dokumenata.
business_meaning: Primary key field that uniquely identifies a purchase order in the SAP system. Used extensively for joining with other procurement tables like EKKO (PO header) and EKPO (PO items). Format typically follows sequential numbering pattern like 4500000001.

description_en: Purchase order item number identifying individual line items within a purchase order.
description_hr: Broj stavke nabavnog naloga koji identificira pojedinačne stavke unutar nabavnog naloga.
business_meaning: Part of compound primary key with EBELN, uniquely identifying each line item within a purchase order. Sequential numbering typically starts at 00010, 00020, etc. Essential for granular procurement analysis at item level.

description_en: Cost center code for organizational cost allocation and reporting.
description_hr: Šifra centra troška za organizacijsku rasporedbu troškova i izvještavanje.
business_meaning: Organizational dimension enabling cost allocation to specific business units or departments. In telecom CPE context, typically represents technical departments, regional offices, or customer service centers receiving equipment. Essential for P&L analysis by organizational unit.

description_en: General ledger account number for financial posting and cost accounting.
description_hr: Broj glavne knjige za financijsko knjiženje i upravljanje troškovima.
business_meaning: Links procurement transactions to specific G/L accounts in the chart of accounts. Critical for financial reporting and cost analysis. In CPE procurement context, typically maps to asset accounts for equipment purchases or expense accounts for services.

description_en: Sequential number for account assignment within a purchase order item.
description_hr: Sekvencijski broj za rasporedbu na račune unutar stavke nabavnog naloga.
business_meaning: Third component of compound primary key, enabling multiple account assignments per PO item. Allows splitting costs across different G/L accounts, cost centers, or projects. Sequential numbering typically 01, 02, etc.

description_en: Last Changed Date
description_hr: Datum zadnje promjene
business_meaning: Last modification date of PO header

description_en: Purchase requisition number that originated this purchasing document.
business_meaning: Links purchase orders back to their originating purchase requisitions, enabling full procure-to-pay traceability. Key for analyzing requisition-to-order conversion rates and approval cycle times in CPE procurement workflows.

description_en: PO Date
description_hr: Datum narudžbenice
business_meaning: Date when PO was created

description_en: Purchasing Document Type
description_hr: Vrsta dokumenta nabave
business_meaning: NB=Standard PO FO=Framework Order UB=Stock Transfer

description_en: Purchasing Document Category
description_hr: Kategorija dokumenta nabave
business_meaning: F=PO K=Contract L=Scheduling Agreement

description_en: Company code that identifies the legal entity for accounting purposes.
description_hr: Šifra poduzeća koja identificira pravnu osobu za potrebe računovodstva.
business_meaning: Standard organizational dimension used for financial reporting and legal entity segregation. In HT context, typically represents different subsidiaries or business units within the Helios Telecom Group structure.

description_en: Purchasing Document Number
description_hr: Broj dokumenta nabave
business_meaning: Unique identifier for purchase order

description_en: Purchasing Group
description_hr: Grupa nabave
business_meaning: Buyer group responsible for procurement

description_en: Purchasing Organization
description_hr: Organizacija nabave
business_meaning: Organizational unit for procurement

description_en: User ID of the person who created the purchasing document.
description_hr: ID korisnika osobe koja je kreirala dokument nabave.
business_meaning: Standard audit field capturing document creator for compliance and workflow analysis. Used to track purchasing activity by user and identify document ownership in approval processes.

description_en: Start date of the validity period for the purchasing document.
business_meaning: Defines the beginning of the validity period for purchase orders or contracts. Used in contract management to determine when purchasing terms become effective.

description_en: End date of the validity period for the purchasing document.
business_meaning: Defines the end of the validity period for purchase orders or contracts. Critical for contract lifecycle management and automatic expiration of purchasing agreements.

description_en: Vendor Account Number
description_hr: Broj konta dobavljača
business_meaning: Links to LFA1 vendor master

description_en: Processing status indicator for the purchasing document workflow.
business_meaning: Status field indicating current stage in procurement workflow such as created, approved, released, or completed. Used for workflow management and reporting on document processing progress.

description_en: Release value or threshold amount for purchasing document approval.
business_meaning: Monetary threshold used in approval workflow to determine required authorization levels. Higher values may require additional approvals based on company purchasing policies and delegation matrix.

description_en: Currency key that specifies the currency for all amounts in the purchasing document.
description_hr: Ključ valute koji specificira valutu za sve iznose u dokumentu nabave.
business_meaning: Standard currency dimension used for financial calculations and reporting. Links to currency conversion tables for multi-currency procurement analysis. Common values: EUR, USD, HRK for Helios Telecom operations.

description_en: Exchange rate used for currency conversion in the purchasing document.
business_meaning: Exchange rate applied when converting foreign currency amounts to local currency. Used for financial reporting and cost analysis in multi-currency procurement scenarios.

description_en: Purchase requisition number linking to originating request.
description_hr: Broj zahtjeva za nabavu koji povezuje s izvornim zahtjevom
business_meaning: References the purchase requisition that initiated this purchase order item. Critical for audit trail and document flow tracing from requirement through procurement to goods receipt. Links to EBAN table.

description_en: Purchase requisition item number within the requisition.
description_hr: Broj stavke zahtjeva za nabavu unutar zahtjeva
business_meaning: Line item number within the purchase requisition referenced by BANFN. Together with BANFN forms unique key to requisition item. Enables traceability from PO back to original business requirement.

description_en: Order price unit for price per unit calculations.
description_hr: Jedinica cijene narudžbe za izračune cijene po jedinici
business_meaning: Unit of measure for price calculations, typically matching base unit but may differ for pricing purposes. Used with NETPR field to determine actual unit price. Essential for multi-unit material pricing scenarios.

description_en: Purchasing Document Number
description_hr: Broj dokumenta nabave
business_meaning: Links to EKKO header

description_en: Item Number
description_hr: Broj stavke
business_meaning: Line item within PO

description_en: Delivery completed indicator for purchase order item.
description_hr: Indikator završene dostave za stavku narudžbenice
business_meaning: Flag indicating whether delivery is complete for this PO item. 'X'=Delivery complete, blank=Open for delivery. Used in procurement reporting and automatic PO closure processing.

description_en: Storage Location
description_hr: Lokacija skladišta
business_meaning: Storage location within plant

description_en: Material group for categorizing materials by type.
description_hr: Grupa materijala za kategorizaciju materijala po vrsti
business_meaning: Groups materials into categories for procurement, pricing, and analysis purposes. Essential dimension for spend analysis and vendor negotiations. Links to material group master data for detailed descriptions.

description_en: Material Number
description_hr: Broj materijala
business_meaning: Links to MARA material master

description_en: Unit of Measure
description_hr: Jedinica mjere
business_meaning: Base unit for the material

description_en: PO Quantity
description_hr: Količina narudžbenice
business_meaning: Ordered quantity

description_en: Net Price
description_hr: Neto cijena
business_meaning: Price per unit in document currency

description_en: Net Value
description_hr: Neto vrijednost
business_meaning: Total value of line item

description_en: Item category type defining purchase order item behavior.
description_hr: Tip kategorije stavke koji definira ponašanje stavke narudžbenice
business_meaning: Controls item processing rules like goods receipt requirement, invoice verification, and account assignment. Common values include '0'=Standard item, '1'=Consignment, '2'=Subcontracting, '3'=Stock transfer.

description_en: Short text description for purchase order item.
description_hr: Kratki tekstni opis stavke narudžbenice
business_meaning: Contains brief descriptive text for the purchase order line item, typically material description or service text. Used for display and reporting purposes when material master description is not sufficient.

description_en: Plant
description_hr: Pogon
business_meaning: Receiving plant/warehouse

description_en: Begin date indicating when equipment status becomes valid or effective.
description_hr: Datum početka koji označava kada status opreme postaje važeći ili na snazi.
business_meaning: Standard SAP validity date field marking the start of equipment status validity period. Used in time-dependent equipment status tracking and historical analysis. Part of SAP's standard date range concept (BEGDT-ENDDT).

description_en: Equipment number serving as unique identifier for equipment objects.
description_hr: Broj opreme kao jedinstveni identifikator za objekte opreme.
business_meaning: Primary key for equipment master data in SAP PM module. Used to link equipment records across functional areas including procurement, maintenance, and asset management. Format follows SAP equipment numbering scheme with leading zeros.

description_en: Status description providing human-readable label for equipment status codes.
business_meaning: Descriptive text corresponding to equipment status codes, making technical status values more accessible to business users. Typically derived from status configuration tables and supports multilingual display in SAP system status management.

description_en: User text providing descriptive information about equipment status or condition.
business_meaning: Free-form text field allowing users to add contextual information about equipment status changes. Commonly used for maintenance notes, status change reasons, or operational remarks that supplement coded status values.
example_value: Equipment ready for deployment after testing

description_en: Equipment category defining the type and characteristics.
description_hr: Vrsta opreme
business_meaning: Classification code that defines equipment characteristics, maintenance requirements, and business rules. Used for grouping similar equipment types in analytics and determining applicable maintenance strategies for CPE assets.

description_en: Equipment Number
description_hr: Broj opreme
business_meaning: Unique CPE device identifier (often = serial number)

description_en: Date when the equipment record was created in SAP.
description_hr: Datum kreiranja
business_meaning: Standard SAP creation date field indicating when the equipment master record was first entered into the system. Critical for tracking equipment lifecycle timing and procurement-to-deployment lead times.

description_en: User ID who created the equipment record.
description_hr: Kreirao korisnik
business_meaning: Standard SAP field capturing the user ID of the person who created the equipment master record. Used for audit trails, data quality tracking, and user activity analysis in equipment management workflows.

description_en: Maintenance work center responsible for the equipment.
description_hr: Radno mjesto održavanja
business_meaning: Organizational unit responsible for maintenance activities on this equipment. Links to work center master data for maintenance planning, resource allocation, and operational responsibility assignment in equipment lifecycle management.

description_en: Manufacturer or vendor code for the equipment.
description_hr: Proizvođač
business_meaning: Identifies the manufacturer or supplier of the equipment. Used for vendor analysis, warranty tracking, and procurement analytics. Links to vendor master data for supplier performance evaluation.

description_en: Start-up Date
description_hr: Datum puštanja u rad
business_meaning: Date CPE was installed at customer premises

description_en: Material Number
description_hr: Broj materijala
business_meaning: Links to MARA material master

description_en: Serial Number
description_hr: Serijski broj
business_meaning: Manufacturer serial number

description_en: Human-readable text description of equipment status.
business_meaning: Descriptive text corresponding to equipment status codes, providing clear business meaning for operational states. Used in reporting and dashboards to display equipment status in user-friendly format rather than cryptic status codes.

description_en: Model or type designation of the equipment.
description_hr: Oznaka tipa
business_meaning: Specifies the model number or type designation assigned by the manufacturer. Used for equipment classification, spare parts management, and technical specification tracking in CPE procurement.

description_en: Address number linking to central address management.
description_hr: Broj adrese za vezu s centralnim upravljanjem adresa.
business_meaning: Key field linking vendor master to address master data (ADRC table). Enables centralized address maintenance across multiple business objects and supports address standardization.

description_en: Date when the vendor master record was created.
description_hr: Datum kada je kreiran master zapis dobavljača.
business_meaning: Creation date in YYYYMMDD format. Used for vendor onboarding analysis, audit trails, and tracking vendor registration patterns over time.

description_en: User ID who created the vendor master record.
description_hr: ID korisnika koji je kreirao master zapis dobavljača.
business_meaning: SAP user name responsible for vendor master creation. Essential for audit trails, data governance, and identifying data stewards in vendor management processes.

description_en: Country Key
description_hr: Ključ države
business_meaning: Vendor country code

description_en: Vendor Account Number
description_hr: Broj konta dobavljača
business_meaning: Unique vendor identifier

description_en: Vendor Name
description_hr: Naziv dobavljača
business_meaning: Company name

description_en: City
description_hr: Grad
business_meaning: Vendor city

description_en: Street address of the vendor's primary location.
description_hr: Adresa ulice glavne lokacije dobavljača.
business_meaning: Contains the street name and house number for vendor correspondence and delivery purposes. Used for geographical analysis and vendor location reporting.

description_en: Primary telephone number of the vendor.
description_hr: Glavni telefonski broj dobavljača.
business_meaning: First telephone number field for vendor contact information. Critical for vendor communication and support processes in procurement workflows.

description_en: Reconciliation account number linking vendor transactions to general ledger accounts.
description_hr: Broj računa usklađivanja koji povezuje transakcije dobavljača s računima glavne knjige.
business_meaning: GL account used for automatic posting of vendor transactions. Determines which balance sheet account receives vendor payables postings. Critical for financial reporting and account reconciliation processes. Typically configured per vendor account group and company code.

description_en: Company code representing the legal entity for vendor accounting and financial reporting.
description_hr: Šifra društva koja predstavlja pravnu osobu za računovodstvo dobavljača i financijsko izvještavanje.
business_meaning: Organizational dimension defining which company code the vendor relationship applies to. Essential for multi-company scenarios where same vendor serves different legal entities within the corporate group. Links to company-specific payment terms and accounting treatment.

description_en: Planning group code used for cash management and vendor payment planning purposes.
description_hr: Šifra planske grupe koja se koristi za upravljanje gotovinom i planiranje plaćanja dobavljača.
business_meaning: Categorizes vendors for cash flow planning and liquidity management. Used by treasury functions to group vendors with similar payment patterns or business criticality. Supports automated payment planning and cash requirement forecasting in financial planning processes.

description_en: Vendor account number serving as unique identifier for vendor master data.
description_hr: Broj računa dobavljača koji služi kao jedinstveni identifikator osnovnih podataka dobavljača.
business_meaning: Primary key for vendor master records in SAP. Links to purchasing documents, invoices, and payments. Standard format is 10-character alphanumeric code, often zero-padded (e.g., '0000100234').

description_en: Payment terms code defining payment conditions and due dates for vendor transactions.
description_hr: Šifra uvjeta plaćanja koja definira uvjete plaćanja i datume dospijeća za transakcije dobavljača.
business_meaning: Master data attribute controlling payment behavior for vendor invoices. Defines cash discount percentages, payment periods, and due date calculations. Common codes include standard terms like '0001' (net 30 days) or '0002' (2% discount within 10 days, net 30).

description_en: Payment methods code specifying allowed payment processing options for vendor payments.
description_hr: Šifra načina plaćanja koja specificira dozvoljene opcije obrade plaćanja za plaćanja dobavljača.
business_meaning: Defines payment processing methods available for this vendor, such as bank transfer, check, or electronic payment. Can contain multiple values separated by spaces (e.g., 'T C' for both transfer and check). Controls automatic payment program behavior and payment medium selection.

description_en: Purchasing organization code defining organizational unit responsible for procurement activities.
description_hr: Kod organizacijske jedinice nabave koja je odgovorna za aktivnosti nabave.
business_meaning: Organizational dimension representing purchasing organization in procurement hierarchy. Each vendor can have different terms per purchasing organization. Links vendor master to organizational structure and determines procurement authorization levels.

description_en: Service entry sheet required indicator controlling whether service confirmation is needed before invoice processing.
description_hr: Indikator obaveznog lista usluga koji kontrolira je li potvrda usluge potrebna prije obrade fakture.
business_meaning: Flag for service procurement control: X = service entry sheet required before invoice verification (three-way match for services), blank = direct invoice processing allowed. Used for service orders and subcontracting to ensure service delivery confirmation before payment.

description_en: Vendor account number for identifying business partners in procurement processes.
description_hr: Broj računa dobavljača za identifikaciju poslovnih partnera u procesima nabave.
business_meaning: Primary key identifying vendors/suppliers in SAP MM module. Used across purchase orders, invoices, and payments. Format typically 10 digits with leading zeros (e.g., 0000100234). Links to vendor master data and all procurement transactions.

description_en: Currency key specifying the default currency for transactions with this vendor.
description_hr: Ključ valute koji specificira zadanu valutu za transakcije s ovim dobavljačem.
business_meaning: Standard ISO currency code (EUR, USD, HRK) defining default currency for purchase orders and invoices with this vendor. Used for currency conversion and financial reporting. Can be overridden at document level.

description_en: Goods receipt required indicator controlling whether goods receipt is mandatory before invoice verification.
description_hr: Indikator obaveznog primitka robe koji kontrolira je li primitak robe obavezan prije provjere fakture.
business_meaning: Flag determining invoice verification workflow: X = goods receipt required before invoice posting (three-way match), blank = invoice can be posted without goods receipt (two-way match). Critical for procurement control and prevents payment without delivery confirmation.

description_en: Payment terms code defining payment conditions and due dates for vendor transactions.
description_hr: Kod uvjeta plaćanja koji definira uvjete plaćanja i rokove dospijeća za transakcije dobavljača.
business_meaning: References payment terms master data specifying payment conditions (net days, cash discount periods, due date calculation). Common values include Z001 (net 30 days), Z014 (2% 14 days net 30). Controls automatic payment processing and cash flow management.

description_en: Total stock quantity representing the complete available quantity in the storage bin.
business_meaning: Aggregatable measure showing total inventory quantity for the material at the specific warehouse location. Base measure for inventory valuation, stock level monitoring, and replenishment planning in CPE procurement operations.

description_en: Warehouse number identifying the logical warehouse in warehouse management.
description_hr: Broj skladišta koji identificira logičko skladište u upravljanju skladištima.
business_meaning: Organizational identifier for warehouse management operations. Used to segregate stock data by warehouse facility. Links to warehouse organizational structure and determines warehouse-specific processes and configurations.

description_en: Storage bin location code specifying the exact position within the warehouse.
description_hr: Kod lokacije skladišnog mjesta koji specificira točnu poziciju unutar skladišta.
business_meaning: Precise warehouse coordinate for stock placement. Enables efficient picking, cycle counting, and inventory tracking. For CPE procurement, critical for locating specific equipment models, serial number ranges, or installation kits within warehouse facilities.

description_en: Storage type code defining the characteristics of the storage area.
description_hr: Kod vrste skladišta koji definira karakteristike skladišnog prostora.
business_meaning: Categorizes warehouse areas by function and storage characteristics. Examples include receiving area, bulk storage, picking area, or quality inspection zone. Influences storage strategies, movement types, and warehouse processes for CPE equipment handling.

description_en: Warehouse stock number uniquely identifying each stock record within a warehouse.
description_hr: Broj skladišne zalihe koji jedinstveno identificira svaki zapis zalihe unutar skladišta.
business_meaning: Primary key for warehouse stock management records. Each quant (quantity unit) in warehouse receives unique LQNUM. Critical for tracking individual stock movements, reservations, and inventory transactions at the most granular level.

description_en: Material number uniquely identifying the material or product.
description_hr: Broj materijala koji jedinstveno identificira materijal ili proizvod.
business_meaning: Links warehouse stock to material master data. In CPE procurement context, represents network equipment, cables, installation materials, or spare parts. Key for joining inventory data with procurement documents, BOMs, and equipment specifications.

description_en: Available stock quantity representing unrestricted, usable inventory quantity.
business_meaning: Quantity available for consumption, excluding blocked, reserved, or quality-held stock. Key measure for procurement planning and order fulfillment. In CPE context, represents equipment ready for installation or deployment projects.

description_en: Plant code identifying the physical location or organizational unit.
description_hr: Kod pogona koji identificira fizičku lokaciju ili organizacijsku jedinicu.
business_meaning: Organizational dimension linking warehouse stock to specific HT facilities or service regions. Determines valuation area, planning parameters, and procurement responsibilities. Critical for regional inventory analysis and supply chain optimization.

description_en: Warehouse number identifying the logical warehouse in warehouse management.
description_hr: Broj skladišta koji identificira logičko skladište u upravljanju skladištem.
business_meaning: Organizational key that identifies a specific warehouse or distribution center within the warehouse management system. Used to segregate inventory and movement operations by physical location or business unit.

description_en: Material number uniquely identifying a material or product in the system.
description_hr: Broj materijala koji jedinstveno identificira materijal ili proizvod u sustavu.
business_meaning: Master data key linking to material master records. In CPE procurement context, represents network equipment, devices, or components being moved within warehouse operations. Essential for inventory tracking and equipment lifecycle management.

description_en: Destination storage bin specifying the exact location where material is placed.
description_hr: Odredišni skladišni pretinac koji specificira točnu lokaciju gdje se materijal postavlja.
business_meaning: Target physical location for material placement during transfer order execution. Ensures proper putaway and maintains inventory accuracy by tracking exact storage coordinates within the destination storage type.

description_en: Destination storage type defining the characteristics of the target storage area.
description_hr: Tip odredišnog skladišta koji definira karakteristike ciljnog skladišnog prostora.
business_meaning: Classification of destination storage area with specific storage conditions and policies. Controls where materials can be placed based on storage requirements, material characteristics, and warehouse organization rules.

description_en: Transfer order number uniquely identifying a warehouse movement document.
description_hr: Broj transfernog naloga koji jedinstveno identificira dokument skladišnog pokreta.
business_meaning: Primary identifier for transfer orders that manage internal warehouse movements, stock transfers, and material relocations. Each transfer order can contain multiple line items for different materials or storage locations.

description_en: Transfer order item number identifying individual line items within a transfer order.
description_hr: Broj stavke transfernog naloga koji identificira pojedinačne stavke u okviru transfernog naloga.
business_meaning: Sequential line item number within a transfer order document. Combined with TANUM forms the complete key for individual material movements or storage location changes within warehouse operations.

description_en: Source storage bin specifying the exact location where material is picked from.
description_hr: Izvorni skladišni pretinac koji specificira točnu lokaciju odakle se materijal uzima.
business_meaning: Precise physical location identifier within a storage type, down to the specific bin, shelf, or coordinate position. Critical for warehouse picking operations and inventory accuracy in transfer order execution.

description_en: Source storage type defining the characteristics of the origin storage area.
description_hr: Tip skladišta izvora koji definira karakteristike izvornog skladišnog prostora.
business_meaning: Classification of storage area characteristics such as storage conditions, access restrictions, or storage method (bulk, rack, etc.). Determines storage policies and movement rules for materials at the source location.

description_en: Source quantity in base unit of measure for the material being transferred.
description_hr: Izvorна količina u osnovnoj mjerni jedinici za materijal koji se prebacuje.
business_meaning: Quantity of material to be moved from source location, expressed in the material's base unit of measure. Critical for inventory accuracy and warehouse operation planning, ensuring correct amounts are picked and transferred.

description_en: Plant code identifying the manufacturing or distribution facility.
description_hr: Kod pogona koji identificira proizvodni ili distribucijski objekt.
business_meaning: Organizational unit representing a physical location where materials are stored, processed, or distributed. In telecom context, typically represents warehouses, distribution centers, or regional facilities managing CPE inventory.

description_en: Material description text in specified language.
description_hr: Tekst opisa materijala na navedenom jeziku.
business_meaning: Human-readable material description corresponding to MATNR and SPRAS combination. Used in purchase requisitions, purchase orders, and reports for business user identification of materials instead of cryptic material numbers.

description_en: Unique identifier for material master data.
description_hr: Jedinstveni identifikator osnovnih podataka materijala.
business_meaning: Material number serves as the primary key in SAP material master. Links to purchase orders, goods receipts, inventory movements, and vendor catalogs. Format typically 18 characters with leading zeros for internal materials.

description_en: Language key for material description text.
description_hr: Ključ jezika za tekst opisa materijala.
business_meaning: SAP language identifier enabling multilingual material descriptions. Common values: E=English, D=German, H=Croatian. One MATNR can have multiple SPRAS entries for localized text.

description_en: Gross Weight
description_hr: Bruto težina
business_meaning: Weight for logistics

description_en: Date when the material master record was created.
description_hr: Datum kada je kreiran glavna zapisa materijala
business_meaning: System-generated timestamp indicating when the material was first created in SAP. Used for material master governance, audit trails, and analyzing introduction patterns of new CPE equipment types into the procurement catalog.

description_en: User ID of the person who created the material master record.
description_hr: Korisnički ID osobe koja je kreirala glavna zapisa materijala
business_meaning: SAP user who initially created the material master. Important for material master governance, accountability, and identifying creation patterns. Links to user master data for full name and organizational assignment in CPE catalog management processes.

description_en: Unit of measure for weight specifications.
description_hr: Jedinica mjere za specifikacije težine
business_meaning: Defines the unit of measure used for weight fields like gross weight (BRGEW) and net weight. Common values include KG (kilograms), G (grams), LB (pounds). Essential for weight-based logistics and shipping calculations in CPE equipment procurement.

description_en: Material Group
description_hr: Grupa materijala
business_meaning: Groups materials by type (routers modems ONTs)

description_en: Material Number
description_hr: Broj materijala
business_meaning: Unique material identifier

description_en: Base Unit of Measure
description_hr: Osnovna jedinica mjere
business_meaning: Default UoM

description_en: Cross-plant material status controlling material usage and transactions.
description_hr: Međupogonski status materijala koji kontrolira korištenje i transakcije
business_meaning: Controls which business transactions are allowed for the material across all plants. Values like 01=Active, 02=Blocked for procurement, 11=Obsolete. Critical for managing CPE equipment lifecycle from active procurement through phase-out and disposal.

description_en: Material Type
description_hr: Vrsta materijala
business_meaning: HAWA=Trading Goods FERT=Finished Product

description_en: Product hierarchy code for detailed product classification structure.
description_hr: Kod hijerarhije proizvoda za detaljnu strukturu klasifikacije proizvoda
business_meaning: Multi-level hierarchical classification allowing detailed product categorization beyond material groups. Typically structured as concatenated levels (e.g., 010203 = Level1:01, Level2:02, Level3:03). For CPE equipment, enables classification like Network/Wireless/Router or Access/Fixed/Modem for sophisticated procurement analytics and sourcing strategies.

description_en: Division code representing a product line or business area.
description_hr: Kod divizije koji predstavlja liniju proizvoda ili poslovnu oblast
business_meaning: Organizational dimension grouping materials by business area or product line within the company structure. For CPE procurement, might distinguish between residential equipment (modems, routers), business equipment, or network infrastructure. Used in pricing, sales organization assignment, and reporting hierarchies.

description_en: Procurement type indicator controlling how material is obtained.
description_hr: Indikator vrste nabave koji kontrolira način nabave materijala.
business_meaning: Procurement type determines sourcing strategy. Common values: E=In-house production, F=External procurement, X=Both. For CPE equipment, typically F (external) since telecommunications equipment is purchased from vendors rather than manufactured internally.

description_en: MRP type controlling material requirements planning procedure.
description_hr: Vrsta MRP-a koja kontrolira postupak planiranja potreba materijala.
business_meaning: MRP type determines how the system calculates material requirements. Common values: PD=MRP, VV=Consumption-based planning, ND=No planning. Critical for CPE inventory optimization and automatic replenishment strategies.

description_en: MRP controller responsible for material planning activities.
description_hr: MRP kontrolor odgovoran za aktivnosti planiranja materijala.
business_meaning: MRP controller is the person or organizational unit responsible for monitoring and managing material availability. In CPE procurement, assigns responsibility for equipment planning and ensures adequate stock levels for deployment activities.

description_en: Purchasing group responsible for procuring the material.
description_hr: Nabavna grupa odgovorna za nabavu materijala.
business_meaning: Purchasing group defines the organizational unit handling procurement activities for this material. Links to buyer responsibilities, vendor relationships, and procurement strategies. Essential for CPE vendor management and sourcing decisions.

description_en: Default storage location for production supply area.
description_hr: Zadano skladište za područje opskrbe proizvodnje.
business_meaning: Production storage location identifies where materials are staged for production or deployment activities. In CPE procurement, represents the warehouse or staging area where equipment is prepared before field deployment to customer premises.

description_en: Unique identifier for material master record.
description_hr: Jedinstveni identifikator matičnog zapisa materijala.
business_meaning: Material number is the primary key linking all material-related transactions and master data. In CPE procurement, identifies specific equipment models, spare parts, or services. Format typically 18 digits with leading zeros.

description_en: Planned delivery time in days from vendor to plant.
description_hr: Planirano vrijeme dostave u danima od dobavljača do pogona.
business_meaning: Planned delivery time represents the expected lead time for material procurement. Critical for MRP calculations and procurement planning. In CPE context, includes vendor lead times plus any customs clearance for imported equipment.

description_en: Serial number profile controlling serial number management.
description_hr: Profil serijskog broja koji kontrolira upravljanje serijskim brojevima.
business_meaning: Serial number profile determines how the system handles serial number assignment and tracking. Essential for CPE equipment where individual units must be tracked through deployment, maintenance, and lifecycle management for regulatory and warranty purposes.

description_en: Special procurement type for alternative sourcing methods.
description_hr: Vrsta posebne nabave za alternativne načine nabave.
business_meaning: Special procurement defines alternative sourcing rules beyond standard procurement. Values like 10=Stock transfer, 20=Subcontracting, 30=Production. In CPE context, might indicate equipment sourced through intercompany transfers or special vendor arrangements.

description_en: Plant code identifying the manufacturing or logistics facility.
description_hr: Šifra pogona koji identificira proizvodno ili logističko postrojenje.
business_meaning: Plant represents the organizational unit for material planning and procurement. In HT context, could represent different regional facilities, warehouses, or technical centers handling CPE equipment deployment and maintenance.

description_en: Quality inspection stock quantity for material at storage location.
description_hr: Količina zaliha u kontroli kvalitete
business_meaning: Stock quantity currently undergoing quality inspection before being released to unrestricted use. Part of the total stock but not available for immediate consumption or delivery until inspection is completed.

description_en: Unrestricted Stock
description_hr: Slobodne zalihe
business_meaning: Available stock quantity

description_en: Storage Location
description_hr: Lokacija skladišta
business_meaning: Specific storage location

description_en: Material Number
description_hr: Broj materijala
business_meaning: Material in stock

description_en: Blocked stock quantity for material at storage location.
description_hr: Količina blokiranih zaliha
business_meaning: Stock quantity that is physically present but blocked from use due to quality issues, legal restrictions, or other business reasons. Cannot be used for production or sales until the block is removed.

description_en: Plant
description_hr: Pogon
business_meaning: Plant where stock is held

description_en: Material number that uniquely identifies a material in the system.
description_hr: Broj materijala koji jedinstveno identificira materijal u sustavu.
business_meaning: Primary key for material master data across all SAP modules. Links to material master (MARA), purchase orders, goods movements, and inventory records. Format follows SAP material number conventions with leading zeros.

description_en: Alternative unit of measure for material quantity conversion.
description_hr: Alternativna mjerna jedinica za konverziju količina materijala.
business_meaning: Unit of measure code used in conversion calculations alongside base unit. Common values include KG (kilogram), ST (piece), M (meter), L (liter). Links to unit conversion tables and enables multi-unit procurement and inventory management.

description_en: Conversion factor denominator for unit of measure calculations.
description_hr: Nazivnik faktora konverzije za kalkulacije mjernih jedinica.
business_meaning: Denominator part of the conversion ratio between alternative unit and base unit. Works with UMREZ to enable precise unit conversions. For example, if 1000 grams = 1 kilogram, then UMREZ=1000 and UMREN=1 for the gram-to-kilogram conversion.

description_en: Conversion factor numerator for unit of measure calculations.
description_hr: Brojnik faktora konverzije za kalkulacije mjernih jedinica.
business_meaning: Numerator part of the conversion ratio between alternative unit and base unit. Used with UMREN to calculate: base_quantity = alternative_quantity * UMREZ / UMREN. Essential for accurate procurement quantities and inventory calculations across different units.

description_en: Batch number for tracking specific production lots or procurement batches.
description_hr: Broj serije za praćenje određenih proizvodnih serija ili nabavnih skupina.
business_meaning: Enables traceability and quality management by grouping materials with common characteristics, production date, or supplier lot. Critical for batch-managed materials in pharmaceuticals, food, or technical equipment where individual unit tracking is required.

description_en: Quality inspection stock quantity temporarily blocked pending quality approval.
description_hr: Količina zaliha u kontroli kvalitete privremeno blokirana do odobrenja kvalitete.
business_meaning: Stock received but not yet released for use, typically from goods receipts requiring quality inspection. Cannot be consumed until moved to unrestricted stock through quality management processes. Important for CPE equipment requiring certification before deployment.

description_en: Unrestricted-use stock quantity available for consumption or sales.
description_hr: Količina zaliha za neograničenu upotrebu dostupna za potrošnju ili prodaju.
business_meaning: Represents freely available inventory that can be reserved, issued, or sold without restrictions. Key measure for procurement planning and availability checking. Measured in base unit of measure for the material.

description_en: Blocked stock quantity unavailable for use due to quality or other restrictions.
description_hr: Količina blokiranih zaliha nedostupna za upotrebu zbog kvalitete ili drugih ograničenja.
business_meaning: Stock explicitly blocked from consumption due to quality issues, damage, or administrative restrictions. Requires manual release or disposal decision. Critical for tracking defective CPE equipment that cannot be deployed to customers.

description_en: Storage location code within a plant for physical inventory management.
description_hr: Šifra skladišta unutar pogona za upravljanje fizičkim zalihama.
business_meaning: Subdivides plant inventory into specific physical or logical storage areas. Used for goods receipt posting, inventory counts, and stock transfer processes. Links with plant to form complete storage address.

description_en: Material number uniquely identifying a material master record.
description_hr: Broj materijala koji jedinstveno identificira zapis osnovnih podataka materijala.
business_meaning: Primary key for material master data across all SAP modules. Links to material specifications, pricing, and procurement parameters. Standard 18-character field often padded with leading zeros.

description_en: Plant code representing a physical location or organizational unit for production and procurement.
description_hr: Šifra pogona koja predstavlja fizičku lokaciju ili organizacijsku jedinicu za proizvodnju i nabavu.
business_meaning: Key organizational dimension in SAP controlling material flow, inventory valuation, and procurement processes. Links to company code and defines local procurement rules and stock valuation areas.

description_en: Header text providing description of the material document.
description_hr: Tekst zaglavlja koji opisuje materijalni dokument.
business_meaning: Free text field for document description or reference information. Often contains delivery note numbers, supplier references, or operational notes. Useful for document identification and audit purposes.

description_en: Document date when the material movement was recorded.
description_hr: Datum dokumenta kada je zabilježeno kretanje materijala.
business_meaning: Business date of the material document, typically the date when the physical goods movement occurred. Used for business reporting and audit trails, may differ from posting date (BUDAT).

description_en: Posting Date
description_hr: Datum knjiženja
business_meaning: Date GR was posted in SAP

description_en: Material Document Number
description_hr: Broj materijalnog dokumenta
business_meaning: Unique GR document number

description_en: Fiscal year of the material document.
description_hr: Fiskalna godina materialnog dokumenta.
business_meaning: Four-digit fiscal year used for temporal partitioning of material documents. Combined with MBLNR forms unique document identification. Essential for period-based reporting and archival processes.

description_en: User Name
description_hr: Korisničko ime
business_meaning: User who posted the GR

description_en: Reference to external document number from source system.
description_hr: Referenca na broj vanjskog dokumenta iz izvornog sustava.
business_meaning: External reference number linking SAP material document to source documents like delivery notes, packing slips, or supplier documents. Critical for three-way matching and cross-system reconciliation in procurement processes.

description_en: Movement Type
description_hr: Vrsta kretanja
business_meaning: 101=GR 102=GR reversal 122=Return to vendor

description_en: Amount in local currency for the goods movement valuation.
description_hr: Iznos u lokalnoj valuti
business_meaning: Monetary value of goods movement in company code currency. Used for financial impact analysis of procurement activities. Positive for goods receipts, negative for goods issues. Critical for spend analytics and inventory valuation.

description_en: PO Number
description_hr: Broj narudžbenice
business_meaning: Reference to originating PO

description_en: PO Item
description_hr: Stavka narudžbenice
business_meaning: Reference to PO line item

description_en: Storage location code within a plant for detailed inventory positioning.
description_hr: Mjesto skladištenja
business_meaning: Four-character storage location identifier within a plant. Provides granular inventory location tracking for materials management. Used with WERKS to define exact storage position for goods receipt analysis.

description_en: Vendor account number for goods receipt processing.
description_hr: Broj dobavljača
business_meaning: Ten-digit vendor master identifier in SAP. Links goods movements to supplier for procurement analytics and three-way matching (PO-GR-Invoice). Critical for vendor performance analysis and spend visibility in CPE procurement.

description_en: Material Number
description_hr: Broj materijala
business_meaning: Material received

description_en: Material Document Number
description_hr: Broj materijalnog dokumenta
business_meaning: Links to MKPF header

description_en: Base unit of measure for the material quantity.
description_hr: Osnovna mjerna jedinica
business_meaning: Three-character ISO unit code defining how material quantities are measured. Essential companion field to MENGE for proper quantity interpretation. Common CPE values include PCE (pieces), KG (kilograms), M (meters).

description_en: Quantity
description_hr: Količina
business_meaning: Quantity received

description_en: Material document fiscal year for temporal grouping and archiving.
description_hr: Fiskalna godina materijalnog dokumenta
business_meaning: Four-digit fiscal year when the material document was posted. Used for period-based reporting and data archiving in SAP. Essential for time-series analysis of goods movements.

description_en: Serial Number Profile
description_hr: Profil serijskog broja
business_meaning: Controls serial number assignment at GR

description_en: Currency code for the document amount field DMBTR.
description_hr: Šifra valute
business_meaning: Five-character ISO currency code defining the monetary unit for DMBTR amounts. Typically company code local currency. Essential for multi-currency procurement reporting and financial consolidation.

description_en: Plant code identifying the physical location where goods movement occurred.
description_hr: Šifra pogona
business_meaning: Four-character plant identifier in SAP organizational structure. Represents manufacturing facility, warehouse, or distribution center. Critical dimension for location-based procurement analytics and inventory management.

description_en: Line Item
description_hr: Stavka
business_meaning: Line item within GR document

description_en: Sales order stock quantity in quality inspection status.
description_hr: Količina zaliha za prodajni nalog u statusu kontrole kvalitete.
business_meaning: Quantity of sales order stock currently undergoing quality inspection. Cannot be delivered until inspection is completed and stock moves to available status. Part of quality management process.

description_en: Sales order stock quantity available for delivery.
description_hr: Količina zaliha za prodajni nalog dostupna za isporuku.
business_meaning: Quantity of material allocated to specific sales orders but not yet delivered. Part of special stock management in SAP. Measured in base unit of measure for the material.

description_en: Sales order stock quantity in blocked status for delivery.
description_hr: Količina zaliha za prodajni nalog u blokiranom statusu za isporuku.
business_meaning: Quantity of sales order stock that is blocked from delivery due to business reasons. May be blocked for quality issues, customer credit problems, or other business constraints.

description_en: Storage location code within a plant for detailed inventory location tracking.
description_hr: Šifra skladišne lokacije unutar pogona za detaljno praćenje lokacije zaliha.
business_meaning: Sub-plant organizational dimension for precise inventory positioning. Multiple storage locations can exist within one plant. Essential for warehouse management and goods movement tracking.

description_en: Material number that uniquely identifies a material master record.
description_hr: Broj materijala koji jedinstveno identificira zapis osnovnih podataka materijala.
business_meaning: Primary key for material master data. Links to material specifications, procurement rules, and inventory records. Format typically 18-character alphanumeric with leading zeros.

description_en: Sales document line item number within a sales document.
description_hr: Broj stavke prodajnog dokumenta unutar prodajnog dokumenta.
business_meaning: Part of composite key with VBELN. Identifies specific line items within sales orders. Each line item can have different materials, quantities, and delivery requirements.

description_en: Sales document number that uniquely identifies a sales order or delivery.
description_hr: Broj prodajnog dokumenta koji jedinstveno identificira prodajni nalog ili isporuku.
business_meaning: Primary key for sales documents. In procurement context, represents sales orders that drive special stock requirements. Links inventory allocation to specific customer commitments.

description_en: Plant code representing a physical location or organizational unit for production and inventory.
description_hr: Šifra pogona koja predstavlja fizičku lokaciju ili organizacijsku jedinicu za proizvodnju i zalihe.
business_meaning: Organizational dimension for plant-specific inventory management. Each plant maintains separate stock levels and procurement processes. Used for multi-plant inventory reporting and analysis.

description_en: Material pricing group used for condition determination in pricing procedures.
description_hr: Grupa cijena materijala koja se koristi za određivanje uvjeta u procedurama cijena.
business_meaning: Controls which pricing conditions apply to the material. Used in condition technique to determine discounts, surcharges, and special pricing. Links material to pricing schema and condition records.

description_en: Account assignment group for material determining G/L account determination.
description_hr: Grupa kontiranja materijala koja određuje pronalaženje glavne knjige.
business_meaning: Controls automatic account determination for material-related transactions. Determines which G/L accounts are posted for inventory movements, cost of goods sold, and material consumption. Links to account determination configuration.

description_en: Material number uniquely identifying a material in the system.
description_hr: Šifra materijala koja jednoznačno identificira materijal u sustavu.
business_meaning: Primary key for materials in SAP. Links to material master data across all modules. Format varies by number range configuration but typically 18 digits with leading zeros.

description_en: Material group 1 for additional material classification and reporting.
description_hr: Grupa materijala 1 za dodatnu klasifikaciju materijala i izvještavanje.
business_meaning: First of five possible material grouping fields for flexible material categorization. Used for reporting, analytics, and condition determination. Company-specific classification beyond standard material type and material group.

description_en: Sales organization code defining the organizational unit for sales activities.
description_hr: Šifra prodajne organizacije koja definira organizacijsku jedinicu za prodajne aktivnosti.
business_meaning: Key organizational dimension in SD module. Controls pricing, customer assignment, and sales processes. Links to organizational structure and determines which materials can be sold in which organization.

description_en: Distribution channel defining the path through which materials reach customers.
description_hr: Distribucijski kanal koji definira put kojim materijali dolaze do kupaca.
business_meaning: Sales and distribution dimension that controls material availability, pricing, and customer assignment. Common values include direct sales, retail, wholesale channels. Part of sales area determination with sales org and division.

description_en: Equipment number uniquely identifying equipment in the equipment master.
description_hr: Broj opreme koji jedinstveno identifikuje opremu u matičnim podacima opreme.
business_meaning: Primary key for equipment master records. Central to CPE management as it links procurement activities to deployed equipment instances. Enables tracking of equipment from purchase through installation, maintenance, and eventual retirement.

description_en: Material number uniquely identifying a material in the material master.
description_hr: Broj materijala koji jedinstveno identifikuje materijal u matičnim podacima materijala.
business_meaning: Links object to specific material master record. Essential for CPE procurement as it connects equipment objects to purchasable materials and their attributes. Enables material-based reporting and inventory tracking for deployed equipment.

description_en: Object number providing standardized reference to SAP object management structures.
description_hr: Broj objekta koji pruža standardizovanu referencu na SAP strukture upravljanja objektima.
business_meaning: Universal object identifier used across SAP modules for linking to object management framework. Contains encoded object type and key information. Enables cross-module references for equipment, materials, and assets in procurement and maintenance processes.

description_en: Object list number used as unique identifier in object management structures.
description_hr: Broj liste objekata koji se koristi kao jedinstveni identifikator u strukturama upravljanja objektima.
business_meaning: Primary key component for object lists in SAP's object management system. Used to group related objects and components together in hierarchical structures. Critical for linking equipment, materials, and serial numbers in complex object relationships.

description_en: Object type code defining the category of object being managed.
description_hr: Kod tipa objekta koji definira kategoriju objekta koji se upravlja.
business_meaning: Categorizes objects into types such as equipment (EQ), material (MA), serial number (SN), or technical assets. Determines which master data tables and business processes apply to the object. Critical for system behavior and object lifecycle management.

description_en: Object counter serving as line number within object list structures.
description_hr: Brojač objekata koji služi kao broj reda unutar struktura liste objekata.
business_meaning: Sequential counter that forms part of composite key with OBKNR. Enables multiple entries per object list, supporting complex equipment hierarchies and component breakdowns. Essential for maintaining order and relationships in multi-level object structures.

description_en: Serial number providing unique identification for individual equipment instances.
description_hr: Serijski broj koji pruža jedinstvenu identifikaciju za pojedinačne instance opreme.
business_meaning: Tracks individual equipment units throughout their lifecycle from procurement to deployment. Critical for CPE asset management, warranty tracking, and maintenance scheduling. Links to equipment master and enables granular inventory control.

description_en: Technical asset number used for asset management identification.
